name: Chicken & Asparagus Roulades
recipeIngredient: 4 small Skinned and boned chicken breast halves (about 2 pounds)
10 ounces frozen asparagus spears, thawed and drained
1/2 medium Red bell pepper, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten each chicken breast half between plastic wrap or waxed paper to a thickness of 1/4-inch.
2. In a small bowl, mix together salt, onion powder, and dill weed. Sprinkle the mixture over the chicken.
3. Place one-fourth of the asparagus spears and bell pepper strips crosswise on the large end of each chicken breast half.
4. Roll the chicken tightly around the vegetables, securing with toothpicks.
5. Arrange the roulades in a square microwavable dish measuring 8 x 8 x 2 inches.
6. Cover the dish with waxed paper and microwave on high for 7 to 9 minutes, rotating the dish halfway through cooking (after 3 minutes).
7. Let the roulades stand covered for 3 minutes before serving.
8. Prepare the Hollandaise Sauce and serve with the chicken. Garnish with dill weed if desired.
4 servings
